tasks.dev: deno task setup && deno task db:start; deno run -A npm:concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "deno task dev:server" "deno task dev:client"
tasks.dev:server: cd server && deno run --watch --allow-net --allow-env --allow-read --allow-sys --env main.ts | deno run -A npm:pino-pretty
tasks.test: deno task test:server && deno task test:client
tasks.test:e2e: deno run --allow-net --allow-env --allow-read --allow-run --allow-sys e2e/setup.ts && cd e2e && npx playwright test
tasks.test:client: cd client && deno run -A npm:vitest run
tasks.db:generate: cd server && deno run -A npm:drizzle-kit generate
tasks.db:seed: cd server && deno run --allow-net --allow-env --allow-read --allow-sys --env db/seed.ts | deno run -A npm:pino-pretty
